_comment: Gems vendored into the single shippable `relaton` gem by `rake build:combined`. Order is load order: `relaton` (the base: Db, registry, cache) first, then infrastructure, then flavor plugins (ISO-independent, then ISO-dependent: bsi/gb/iec/jis/ogc/plateau, then doi). Per-gem source folders under gems/ are kept; this list only controls what the build vendors into one gem. relaton-cli is intentionally excluded (not bundled in `relaton`).
